ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Consolidated) */,
  "year_ending" TEXT /* Year the financial statement ended */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity (ROE) for the stock */,
  "ltp" REAL /* Last traded price (LTP) of the stock */,
  "chg" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering (IPO) date of the stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the stock record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the statement belongs to */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "year_ending" TEXT /* Year the financial statement ended */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue for the stock */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the stock */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income for the stock */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets for the stock */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities for the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the financial statement record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kpis" (
  "kpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each KPI */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the KPI belongs to */,
  "kpi_name" TEXT /* Name of the KPI (e.g., Return on Equity, Debt-to-Equity Ratio) */,
  "kpi_value" REAL /* Value of the KPI */,
  "kpi_date" TEXT /* Date when the KPI was calculated */,
  "kpi_period" TEXT /* Period over which the KPI is calculated (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the KPI record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_kpis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the market data belongs to */,
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the market data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news feed */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news feed belongs to */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news feed */,
  "news_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news feed */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news feed */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news feed */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full news article */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis of the news content (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the news feed record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the prediction belongs to */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction associated with the trend */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend started */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the trend ended */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the trend record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the analysis report belongs to */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis report */,
  "analysis_report" TEXT /* Content of the analysis report */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., technical analysis, fundamental analysis) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analysis record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the portfolio belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the portfolio record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
